name: G-2 source-organized file format: recommended_set must be a subset of all_set; a rule in recommended but not in all is rejected
command:
printf 'source:
  id: test-src
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://e.t/d
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
  content_hash: "sha256:abc"
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: "MIT"
rules:
  - id: g-test-001
    name: r
    description: r
    detector: r.sh
    type: problem
    fixable: null
    has_suggestions: false
    deprecated: false
    replaced_by: []
    docs_url: "https://e.t/r"
    requires_type_checking: false
    recommended: true
    severity: P1
    version: "1.0.0"
    semver: "1.0.0"
    rule_state: warn-only
    provenance: [{source: test-src, class: published-standard, section_id: "1", url: "https://e.t/r", fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z", content_hash: "sha256:abc"}]
recommended_set: [g-test-001, g-test-999]
all_set: [g-test-001]
' > sf.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-source-file.sh" "$PWD/sf.yaml" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'recommended_set' err.txt && echo subset_enforced 1>&2
